ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_supply_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Year and month of the data collection (e.g., 01-2014) */,
  "connections" REAL /* Number of water connections */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "slum_population" REAL /* Population in slum areas */,
  "non_slum_population" INTEGER /* Population in non-slum areas */,
  "demand" REAL /* Water demand in liters */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Water consumption in liters */,
  "water_quality_index" INTEGER /* A measure of water quality (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "leakage_rate" REAL /* The percentage of water lost due to leaks */,
  "source_quality" TEXT /* The quality of the water source (e.g., groundwater, surface water) */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* The type of water treatment used (e.g., chlorination, filtration) */,
  "infrastructure_age" INTEGER /* The average age of the water infrastructure in the region */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* The current maintenance status of the water infrastructure (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_supply_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* The climate zone of the region */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* A list of water sources available in the region (e.g., groundwater, surface water) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last infrastructure inspection */,
  "emergency_contacts" TEXT /* Contact information for emergency services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* A checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the file is encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* The encryption key used (if the file is encrypted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the data quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "issues" TEXT /* List of any issues found during the check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* The user who performed the data quality check */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* The tool used for validation (e.g., Python script, SQL query) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence in the data quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* The method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* The date of the last data update from the source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the source is considered reliable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_modifications" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* The reason for the data modification */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the modification */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* The date when the modification was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_modifications_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_modifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the alert is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* The source of the alert (e.g., system, user) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* The action taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* The user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the report is confidential */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* A list of users or departments the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "upload_method" TEXT /* The method used for the data upload (e.g., API, manual) */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the uploaded data has been validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* The date when the data was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validation process */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* The tool used for validation (e.g., Python script, SQL query) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence in the validation */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the validation was automated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_supply_data ("data_id")
)
